name: BlackRock 2022 Global Income Opportunity Trust
summary: BlackRock 2022 Global Income Opportunity Trust is a closed ended fixed income launched by BlackRock, Inc. The fund is co-managed by BlackRock Advisors, LLC, BlackRock International Limited, and BlackRock (Singapore) Limited. It invests primarily in fixed income markets across the globe. The fund benchmarks the performance of its portfolio against the Bloomberg Barclays 1-3 Month U.S. Treasury Bill Index. BlackRock 2022 Global Income Opportunity Trust was formed on February 23, 2017 and is domiciled in the United States.
